Get Started Past Work

Services

Website Only

$3,500 - $4,000

  • Custom modern design
  • Menu integration with your database
  • English/Spanish language toggle
  • Mobile responsive & Fast loading
  • Social media integration

POS Integration Only

$2,500 - $3,000

  • Connect existing site to POS
  • Order flow setup
  • API integration + authentication
  • Testing & deployment
  • Staff training
Save $1,000

Full Package

$5,500 - $6,500

  • Both services included
  • Complete solution, one vendor
  • Custom site + custom POS orders
  • Seamless end-to-end integration

Past Work

Taco Restaurant

Problem: High reliance on third-party delivery apps eating into margins.

Solution: Custom-built robust online order flow integrated via POS API.

Result: Reduced labor costs, recaptured 20% order volume direct, streamlined ticket flow.

Food Truck Operation

Problem: Needed to build brand credibility and handle variable locations with high volume pre-orders.

Solution: Custom mobile-first site + direct POS integration for pre-orders.

Result: Tripled pre-order volume; built solid brand presence ahead of brick-and-mortar opening.

Who We Are

Brass Tacks was built by someone who understands exactly how restaurants operate.

We combine deep technical expertise with hands-on restaurant industry knowledge. We aren't an agency throwing generic templates at you. We know that a missed order ticket or confusing POS flow costs you money, so we build reliable, custom web solutions that solve real operational problems.

Friendly, competent, and focused entirely on making your tech work for you — no BS.

Let's talk about your restaurant's tech

We solve real problems for independent restaurants. Custom solutions, fair pricing, no BS.
